Bash(git -C "e:/Projects/APS/APS_APP" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
1.3.1: Fix NSIS installation and improve update UX

- Add gracefulShutdown function for centralized resource cleanup

- Improve app lifecycle events \(before-quit, will-quit, second-instance\)

- Add NSIS configuration for better installer behavior
- Add downloadUpdate and quitApp preload APIs

EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "e:/Projects/APS/APS_APP" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix IPC event name mismatch and add update error handling

- Fix WebSocket event names: memo-created → memo:created, memo-deleted → memo:deleted, consultation-updated → consultation:updated
- Add update-error event handling in UpdateProgressModal
- Add error UI with retry button
- Remove unused api-create-memo preload API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "e:/Projects/APS/APS_APP" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix critical bugs: dead code, duplicate listeners, memory leaks

- Fix useWebSocketSync signature mismatch \(removed dead callback code from AppRouter\)
- Remove broken broadcastMemoCreated/Deleted calls in memo-detail.html
- Fix duplicate WebSocket connect/disconnect handlers in main.js
- Fix parent window listener accumulation \(use .once\(\) instead of .on\(\)\)
- Add download-in-progress guard to prevent concurrent updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
